monitoring.title: Real-Time Water Monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: Continuous supervision platform for the water supply systems of Silvanópolis and Miranorte, Tocantins State.
monitoring.smart_city_text: Integrated into the Smart City 4.0 concept, this system connects physical infrastructure to a digital layer of intelligence — sensors, telemetry and real-time analysis — to make public management more efficient, transparent and responsive. All processes are continuously supervised by artificial intelligence algorithms that monitor operational patterns, automatically identify deviations and anomalies, and send immediate alerts to designated managers or technicians — ensuring each occurrence is handled by the right person, at the right time, before it becomes a critical problem.
monitoring.data_decision_text: Municipal managers and technical teams monitor reservoir levels, pump flow and daily production without on-site inspections — reducing operational costs and response time to failures or pressure drops.
monitoring.incident_text: Anomalies in consumption patterns or pump failures are automatically detected. The team is alerted in real time and can act before supply disruption affects the population.
monitoring.sustainability_text: Precise pump control reduces electricity consumption and water waste. With historical data and trend projections, management can plan preventive maintenance based on concrete evidence.
